confirmation.subject: You have been summoned: Benediction
confirmation.preheader: The blessing approaches. You will know when it arrives.
body: A blessing spoken in two voices. The congregation appoints a new speaker.
When the rite begins, we will reach you.

releaseDay.subject: Heed now the summons, Benediction is live!
releaseDay.preheader: Hear the blessing of our elder speaker
body: Benediction is live. Hear the blessing:
Every voice you hear spent years becoming itself.
If this moved you, tell someone.
